title: Coraza WAF Configuration
description: Configuration for the Coraza WAF extension. Provides Web Application Firewall protection using SecLang directives.

directives.description: List of Coraza SecLang directives. Each entry is a single directive string. Special includes are supported: "Include @recommended.conf", "Include @crs-setup.conf", "Include @owasp_crs/*.conf".

mode.description: WAF inspection mode. Defaults to "REQUEST_ONLY" if not set.

header_mode.description: Controls which request headers are forwarded to Coraza. "FULL" (default) forwards all headers. "MINIMAL" forwards only a security-relevant subset (User-Agent, Accept, Content-Type, Content-Length, Cookie, Authorization, Referer, Origin, X-Forwarded-For, X-Real-IP) to reduce per-request allocation cost.
